name: Denied Access To Remote Desktop
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pushkarev Dmitry
SIGMA Title: Denied Access To Remote Desktop
SIGMA Description: This event is generated when an authenticated user who is not allowed to log on remotely attempts to connect to this computer through Remote Desktop.
Often, this event can be generated by attackers when searching for available windows servers in the network.


False positives:
- Valid user was not added to RDP group

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4825 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Denied Access To Remote Desktop on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4825 AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Denied Access To Remote Desktop
